LanguageData.HAR_OT_Bullet_AssaultRifle_a.label: Tyrion Tofeki (bullet)
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Bullet_AssaultRifle_b.label: Tyrion Cannon (bullet)
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Weapon_Gun_a.label: Tyrion Tofeki
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Weapon_Gun_a.description:
An assault rifle used by the Outerms.
It is characterized by strong armor penetration and toxin-laced ammunition.
Its accuracy is average at any range.
Its greatest strength is how easy it is to handle, allowing it to keep firing with short intervals between attacks.
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Weapon_Gun_b.label: Tyrion Cannon
LanguageData.HAR_OT_Weapon_Gun_b.description:
An ultra-long-range sniper rifle used by the Outerms.
It is characterized by strong armor penetration and toxin-laced ammunition.
It excels at punching through enemies from far away,
but is poor at engaging targets up close.
